tellUsAboutPscPage.title: WELSH - Tell us about people with significant control (PSCs)
tellUsAboutPscPage.pageInformation: WELSH - We'll ask you whether the partnership will have any PSCs. If it will, you'll need to tell us about them.
tellUsAboutPscPage.moreThanOne: WELSH - If the partnership has more than one PSC, you'll add them one at a time.
tellUsAboutPscPage.futureChanges: WELSH - You'll need to file any future changes to PSCs on paper.

willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.title: WELSH - Will the partnership have any people with significant control (PSCs) on registration?
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.optionYes: WELSH - Yes, at least one person will count as a PSC in relation to the partnership. This may be an individual, a relevant legal entity (RLE) or an other registrable person (ORP)
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.optionNo: WELSH - No, there is no person identified as a PSC in relation to the limited partnership
willThePartnershipHaveAnyPscPage.errorMessage: WELSH - You must select whether the partnership will have any people with significant control (PSCs) on registration.

whichTypePage.title: WELSH - Which type of person with significant control (PSC) do you need to add?
whichTypePage.hint: WELSH - You can add more later.
whichTypePage.errorMessage: WELSH - Select which type of PSC you need to add

otherRegistrablePersonInformation.title: WELSH - What is an other registrable person?
otherRegistrablePersonInformation.line1: WELSH - An other registrable person (ORP) is a non-corporate entity or office that can legally act as a PSC. This can be:
otherRegistrablePersonInformation.bullet1: WELSH - a corporation sole - a single incorporated office occupied by one person, such as Lord Mayor of London
otherRegistrablePersonInformation.bullet2: WELSH - a government or government department of a country, a territory, or a part of a country or territory
otherRegistrablePersonInformation.bullet3: WELSH - an international organisation whose members include two or more countries or territories (or their governments)
otherRegistrablePersonInformation.bullet4: WELSH - a local authority or local government body in the UK or elsewhere

addRelevantLegalEntity.title: WELSH - Add a relevant legal entity PSC
addRelevantLegalEntity.legalEntityName: WELSH - What is the relevant legal entity (RLE)'s name?
addRelevantLegalEntity.legalFormOrCorporateIdentity: WELSH - What is its legal form or corporate identity?
addRelevantLegalEntity.legalFormOrCorporateIdentityHint: WELSH - This is the corporate body type. For example, private limited company.
addRelevantLegalEntity.governingLaw: WELSH - What governing law does it operate under?
addRelevantLegalEntity.governingLawHint: WELSH - For example, the Companies Act 2006.
addRelevantLegalEntity.whichRegister: WELSH - Which register is it entered in? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.whichRegisterHint: WELSH - For example, the Register of Companies UK.
addRelevantLegalEntity.countryRegistered: WELSH - Which country is it registered in? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.registrationNumber: WELSH - What is the registration number? (if applicable)
addRelevantLegalEntity.registrationNumberHint: WELSH - For example, the company number.
addRelevantLegalEntity.publicRegisterLine1: WELSH - We'll show all of this information on the public register.

addOtherRegistrablePerson.title: Add an other registrable person PSC
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalEntityName: What is the relevant legal entity (ORP)'s name?
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalFormOrCorporateIdentity: What is its legal form or corporate identity?
addOtherRegistrablePerson.legalFormOrCorporateIdentityHint: This is the corporate body type. For example, private limited company.
addOtherRegistrablePerson.governingLaw: What governing law does it operate under?
addOtherRegistrablePerson.publicRegisterLine1: We'll show all of this information on the public register.

whichTypeOfNatureOfControlPage.title: Which type of nature of control does the relevant legal entity (RLE) have?
